disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No signs of secondary infection — no weeping yellow fluid/honey crusts (bacterial), no clustered punched-out painful vesicles/rapidly worsening with systemic illness (eczema herpeticum), no fever
trigger_question_examples: Any weeping yellow fluid, honey-coloured crusts, or lots of identical small punched-out blisters?
Are you feverish or feeling unwell with it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No weeping/crusting or punched-out blisters, and no fever — it's dry, red and itchy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Flexural distribution (elbow/knee creases), chronic xerosis and lichenification, personal atopy (hay fever), folds spared — atopic (not contact/scabies)
trigger_question_examples: Is it mainly in the creases of your elbows and knees, and do you have a history of eczema/hay fever?
Anyone else in the house itchy, or itch mainly in the finger webs/wrists at night (scabies)?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it's in the elbow and knee creases, I've had eczema and hay fever for years, and no one else is itchy.
